title: How Can We Measure?
description: Learn different ways to measure length using objects

questions.title: How Can We Measure?
questions.instruction: If you can't line up the ends, how can you compare lengths?

options: Use objects as a pencil, your finger, or a tape
data.correctAnswer: Use objects as a pencil, your finger, or a tape

questions.title: Measuring Length
questions.instruction: What can you use to measure the length of a desk?

questions.title: Measuring Width
questions.instruction: How can you measure the width of a piece of paper?

options: Fold the paper and stack it
Use your finger to check how many finger spaces
